calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for Brian Keith.

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that Heirs of Joseph and James were present in Court. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio also presented oral argument and explained services provided to support her request for approval of fees as broker and attorney. The Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Nov-19-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The accounting petition was continued to November 19, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
